retrieved_result: Everything you need to know about insurance agents & prices (but were too bored to ask…) by Adam Cecil, October 8th, 2014. There are two types of people that can sell you life insurance: agents and brokers. Oftentimes, the two terms are used interchangeably, leading to confusion about what role an agent plays.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses insurance agents and prices, not API debugging; topic mismatch indicates not relevant.
